description_long: This is a male adult figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He has a full beard and long, thick, textured hair styled in locs that extend to his upper back. He is dressed in a short-sleeve, fitted t-shirt and straight-cut jeans that reach his ankles, paired with low-top casual shoes. The figure's facial features are well-defined, and his hands are relaxed at his sides. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes have a simple, slip-on design. The overall appearance is casual and contemporary, suitable for an urban environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male with long locs, a beard, t-shirt, jeans, and casual shoes, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, beard, t-shirt, and full front of jeans and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the length and volume of the hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with long locs, back of the t-shirt, jeans, and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the drape of the hair down the back.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt and jeans with low-top casual shoes
attribute_hairstyle: long locs with full volume extending to upper back
